summary: Project involves a multi-section app (with sections like Artisan, NYSC/Youth Corps, etc.). User is updating section labels.

existing_features.title: Replace all occurrences of the job type label 'Short-Time' with 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' across the entire frontend, including job type badges, filter dropdowns, selection options, and any display text where 'Short-Time' appears as a job category or section label.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update the backend job type enum or variant in main.mo to rename the 'ShortTime' (or equivalent) variant to 'NYSC' (or 'YouthCorps'), ensuring all related backend functions, filters, and data handling reflect the new type name.
